title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 528.510 - Judgment by default rendered, when
text:
528.510.  Judgment by default rendered, when. — A judgment by default may be rendered against any defendant who does not appear and answer to the command of the summons or publication, and payment of the money ordered accordingly.
(RSMo 1939 § 1759) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1595; 1919 § 2043; 1909 § 2607
